summary: U1 preserves v1 bytes, dispatches from the input contract id, validates v2 renderer profiles fail-closed, keeps the twin proof-game behavior frozen and identical, leaves explicit non-targets untouched, and records browser evidence without making a device claim.

findings.detail: The host parser accepts a string sentinel that may not correspond to the revision.
findings.repair: When a revision exists, require the sentinel to equal its first eight digest characters; require null with a null revision.

findings.detail: The host parser keeps a fail-safe but hand-copied renderer-profile vocabulary.
findings.repair: Document the kernel contract as its authority or reconcile the set in the round-trip test.

findings.detail: The seed readiness flag means the shell state is laid out, not that fonts and images have completed every post-paint step.
findings.repair: Let U10 own a post-ready capture delay or tighten readiness in a later integration card.

findings.detail: The proof-game README and brief retain generic scaffold contributor text.
findings.repair: Add a short experiment banner linking the protocol and file fences.

reviewLimits: The reviewer sandbox denied direct test execution; the conductor independently ran and recorded the full project gate, lint, focused probe tests, and both production builds.
Physical-device proof is outside U1 and was not evaluated as a blocker.
